Startup Compass
Back to Analysis Setup

Analyst Review & Deep Analysis

Upload interview notes, add qualitative comments, and conduct deep analysis to compare Human vs AI insights.

Analysis Workflow Progress
Step 1 of 5
1
Document Submission
Upload interview transcripts, DD reports, or other relevant documents.

Drop your file here or click to browse

Supported: PDF, DOCX, TXT

2
Qualitative Insights
Add notes from CEO interviews, Q&A sessions, and other qualitative assessments. This data is stored temporarily and should be saved.
3
NLP Analysis Input
Add 30-40 specific comments for thematic, sentiment, and AI-Human comparison analysis. Each comment should be a distinct thought, observation, or quote from your review. Currently, these are not saved to a database.
4
Run Analysis
Execute thematic, sentiment, deep content, and AI vs Human gap analysis on your inputs.

Ready to Run Analysis

Click the button below to process your documents, qualitative insights, and NLP comments through thematic, sentiment, and AI-Human comparison analysis.
